lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, what is this place?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: What is this place? This is Soul Wars, a glorious battleground where you must fight to crush the souls of your enemies!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Are souls easy to crush?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Easier than you'd imagine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So how does it all work?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I can give you a demonstration if you're interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's do it.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, you're not looking so great. You should cure yourself of poison before I give you the demonstration.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, you don't look so good. You should cure yourself of disease before I give you the demonstration.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, it looks like you have some restricted items with you. You should put them somewhere safe before we continue. Food, potions, capes, followers and non-combat items are all restricted.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, it looks like you're not actually ready for a demonstration right now.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Very well. Let's get started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm good.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ah, you again. Are you ready for that demonstration?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ah, you again. If you're here to crush some souls then I'm afraid you won't be able to. I can still help with anything else you need though.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ah, you again. Are you here to crush some souls? Just head into a waiting area if you want to get started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about Soul Wars?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Well I've given you the demonstration. Best thing now is to head into a waiting area and get started. That said, you won't be able to do that at the moment.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I can give you the demonstration again if you want? I also have a book that might be useful.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Well I've given you the demonstration. Best thing now is to head into a waiting area and get started. That said, I can give you the demonstration again if you want? I also have a book that might be useful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you give me the demonstration again?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, you're not looking so great. You should cure yourself of poison before I give you the demonstration.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, you're not looking so great. You should cure yourself of disease before I give you the demonstration.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, it looks like you have some restricted items with you. You should put them somewhere safe before we continue. Food, potions, capes, followers and non-combat items are all restricted.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Very well. Let's get started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have the book?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: It looks like you already have one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, alright then.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Is there something else you need?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Of course. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Now, is there something else you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So be it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm good.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about rewards?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Certainly! I sell various rewards to those who have earned Zeal from Soul Wars battles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of rewards are there?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I can offer you some of my knowledge in various skills, I can use my abilities to imbue some of your items with additional power, and I also have some items I have found on my travels.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Would you like to see?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Very well. Is there something else you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about ammunition?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: How are the new capes working out for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just fine, thanks!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Great, now get back in there and crush some souls!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, right away!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: How are the new capes working out for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not bad. But I was wondering if they could be improved any further?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Well if you show me a better device I might be able to sort something out for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about this one?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again. I might be able to do something if you show me a better one, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about this one?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, very interesting. Let's see what we can do.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There we go! It's not quite the same, but it should work out just fine for you.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Bear in mind that the enchantment is bound to my power and so will only work for you while you are in a Soul Wars battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I don't really have time to discuss the finer points of Fletching, you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not like that! You see, I helped create a device which returns my ammunition.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Really? If you could show it to me, I might be able to sort something out for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.

sections.title: Attempting to pass through the blue or neutral barriers

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hey! Where are you going?

sections.title: Attempting to pass through the red barrier
Attempting to take items from tables

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hey! You don't need those. You're not in a real battle yet.

sections.title: Attempting to attack another player's Zimberfizz or before instructed by Nomad

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hey! Don't attack those. You're not in a real battle yet.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: To continue the demonstration, come speak to me. I'm by the avatar in the south-west of the battleground.

sections.title: Stepping inside the western neutral graveyard

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: This is one of the graveyards that your team can capture.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: For the purposes of this demonstration, however, I have kept it inactive.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: To continue the demonstration, come speak to me. I'm by the avatar in the south-west of the battleground.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Welcome to Soul Wars! Let's get started.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what's this place all about?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: To the south you will have seen an avatar. You must fight to protect your team's avatar, and defeat the opposing team's avatar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you crazy? Have you seen the size of it?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You're here to fight, not whine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how am I supposed to take on one of those?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: By capturing the Soul Obelisk, which lies at the centre of the battleground, and offering it soul fragments.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Let's head towards the Obelisk now. I can point out some of the important landmarks on the way. Meet me to the north when you are ready to learn more.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You might find this little area behind me useful for defending your avatar. There's one in the other team's base, too.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: During battle, you can gather supplies here to aid you and your teammates.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: The Soul Obelisk is just a little way from here. Let's continue on; I'll meet you to the east.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: When you kill a creature in Soul Wars, they will leave a soul fragment behind, which you can use to charge the Soul Obelisk.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Zimberfizz has such a soul fragment. Why don't you kill him and take it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want me to kill him?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Yes!

sections.title: Talking to Nomad before killing Zimberfizz

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Come on! Kill him already and get that soul fragment.

sections.title: Talking to Nomad with the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Good job! Let's carry on to the Soul Obelisk and channel this soul fragment into it. It's just to the east, over a bridge and on a small island.

sections.title: Talking to Nomad without the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Good job! Now, you've got that soul fragment, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that...

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've lost it? You're lucky you're not in a real battle yet!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here, have this one. Just look after it this time.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Make some space and I'll give you one. Just look after it this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try...

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Now! Let's carry on to the Soul Obelisk and channel this soul fragment into it. It's just to the east, over a bridge and on a small island.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Now, to have a chance against an avatar, you are going to need souls. Lots of souls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What am I going to do with souls?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: The Soul Obelisk is immensely powerful and, by channelling souls into it, you can weaken the enemy avatar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does that work?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: All I know is that it does, and that you should do it. Lots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, where do I get these souls from?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You can kill the souls that inhabit the arena ruins and harvest their soul fragments.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: For the purposes of this demonstration however, we will use my minion Zimberfizz.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Zimberfizz! Heel!

sections.title: Talking to Nomad without the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here we are at the Soul Obelisk. Now, you've got that soul fragment, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that...

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've lost it? You're lucky you're not in a real battle yet!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here, have this one. Just look after it this time.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Make some space and I'll give you one. Just look after it this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try...

sections.title: Talking to Nomad with the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here we are at the Soul Obelisk. Now, to reap the full benefit of the soul fragment, you will need to first be in control of the Obelisk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I do that?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Various areas of the battleground can come under your team's control. To gain control, you must have more team members than the opposing team in these areas.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: If you outnumber the enemy, you will gradually take control. Let's try it out now.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: We shall use Zimberfizz to represent an enemy team member.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Minion! Heel!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Come on, give him a good kick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought he was dead? Didn't we kill him earlier?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ha! He wishes! No, his service to me is far from over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Poor little guy.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ha! I'm sure he loves the attention, right Zimberfizz?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Right, now that Zimberfizz is no longer in the Obelisk's capturable area, you outnumber the enemy! The Soul Obelisk will now begin to fall under your control.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Right. Now, go and charge the Obelisk with that soul fragment and see what happens.

sections.title: If the player destroyed the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here we are at the Soul Obelisk. Now, you've got that soul fragment, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that...

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've lost it? You're lucky you're not in a real battle yet!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here, have this one. Just look after it this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try...

sections.title: Talking to Nomad before sacrificing the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Go on, use the soul fragment on the Obelisk.

sections.title: Talking to Nomad after sacrificing the soul fragment

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Good job! Now that you have charged the Obelisk, the enemy avatar will have been weakened.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, once I've charged the Obelisk, can I just kick back and wait for the end of the game?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ha! I think not! I'm not about to reward those who don't put the effort in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well. Say, do you think the enemy avatar minds us weakening it like this?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, why don't we go find out?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: So, here we are in the enemy base.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that the enemy avatar over there?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Yeah, and it looks like you made it pretty mad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? You're the one that told me to weaken it!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Ha! Don't worry - I won't let it kill you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Phew!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Of course, that doesn't mean I won't kill you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Argh!

sections.title: Talking to Nomad as a ghost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wooooooooooo!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woooooo! Woooooo!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Sorry, I don't speak ghost.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There we go! Much better.

sections.title: Talking to Nomad as a human

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There we go! Much better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! You killed me.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: At least it wasn't permanent! Think of it as an opportunity to learn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: The other team will be after you and any soul fragments you have collected, after all.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I needed to show you what happens when you fall in battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you turn me into a ghost?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Not exactly. The Soul Obelisk tried to claim your soul, as it does with all who perish in the battleground.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Only my power brought you here, and returned you to life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You're more useful to me alive... for now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any other painful things to learn about this place?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There is much more to this place, but you don't need to know about it yet.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: If you want to learn more, I can give you a Soul Wars guide upon our return to the waiting area.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Use the large blue portal at the back of this graveyard to return to the waiting area. Why not sign up for a battle while you're there?

sections.title: Talking to Nomad after completing the tutorial

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Use the portal over there to return to the waiting area. I'll see you on the other side!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here we are. The waiting areas are just south of here, but you won't be able to join a battle right now.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here we are. Just head south to the waiting areas if you want to join a battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all well and good, but what do I get out of all of this?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I can offer you experience in various skills, and items I have found on my travels.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: I have a copy of the Soul Wars guide here. It contains information that I didn't have time to cover.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You don't need to know it all to get started, but the section on burying bones could be useful.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Did you want to take it and read it in your own time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, it looks like you already have one.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Oh, alright then.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yikes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh boy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Check out this dead chicken!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: Ava's accumulator, accumulator max cape, max cape or ranging cape

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Check out this dead chicken!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again. I might be able to do something if you show me a better one, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, very interesting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could maybe make your capes do something similar to what this does?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Let's see what we can do.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There we go. It's not quite the same, but it should work out just fine for you.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Bear in mind that the enchantment is bound to my power and so will only work for you while you are in a Soul Wars battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help!

sections.title: Ava's assembler or assembler max cape

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Check out this dead chicken!

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: You've already shown me this dead chicken. I don't really need to see it again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Hmm, very interesting. This one seems more powerful than the last one you showed me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right. I was wondering if you could maybe upgrade your capes again?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Let's see what we can do.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: There we go. It's not quite the same, but it should work out just fine for you.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Bear in mind that the enchantment is bound to my power and so will only work for you while you are in a Soul Wars battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks for the help!

sections.title: At the start of a Soul Wars Game

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: The time is now! Crush their souls!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, what is this place?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: What is this place? This is Soul Wars, a glorious battleground where you must fight to crush the souls of your enemies!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Are souls easy to crush?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Easier than you'd imagine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So how does it all work?

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Well I'm still getting things set up right now. Once everything is ready, return to me and I'll give you a demonstration.

lines.speaker: Nomad
lines.text: Here to crush some souls? Just head into a waiting area to the south to get started.
